title: centaurea scabiosa var. cephalariifolia
intro: Centaurea scabiosa var. cephalariifolia, also known as blue thistle or scabiosa, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea scabiosa var. cephalariifolia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. Centaurea scabiosa var. cephalariifolia can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
